name: 二项式定理
subject: math
curriculum_points: 高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「二项式定理」的基本概念与方法
学业要求：能在真实情境中识别、运用「二项式定理」解决问题
活动建议：通过观察、实验、练习、讨论等方式深化对「二项式定理」的理解

excerpts.text: 能用多项式运算法则和计数原理证明二项式定理，会用二项式定理解决与二项展开式有关的简单问题。
能够结合具体实例，理解排列、组合、二项式定理与两个计数原理的关系，能够运用两个计数原理推导二项式定理的相关公式。
根据多项式相乘的运算法则，探索二项式定理的构造性证明，体会运算法则的作用。

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

deep_snippets.text:
Chapter OUtline 9.1 Sequences and Their Notations 9.2 Arithmetic Sequences 9.3 Geometric Sequences 9.4 Series and Their Notations 9.5 Counting Principles 9.6 Binomial Theorem 9.7 Probability Figure 1 (credit: Robert S. Donovan, Flickr.) Introduction A lottery winner has some big decisions to make regarding what to do with the winnings. Buy a villa in Saint Barthélemy? A luxury convertible? A cruise around the world? The likelihood of winning the lottery is slim, but we all love to fantasize about what we could buy with the winnings. One of the first things a lottery winner has to decide is whether to take the winnings in the form of a lump sum or as a series of regular payments, called an annuity, over the next 30 years or so. This decision is often based on many factors, such as tax implications, interest rates, and investment strategies. There are also personal reasons to consider when making the choice, and one can make many arguments for either decision. However, most lottery winners opt for the lump sum. In this chapter, we will explore the mathematics behind situations such as these. We will take an in-depth look at annuities. We will also look at the branch of mathematics that would allow us to calculate the number of ways to choose lottery numbers and the probability of winning. Sequences, Probability and Counting Theory
> **[Figure 48, Page 771]** A figure or diagram (488×283px) related to: Chapter, OUtline, Sequences, Notations, Arithmetic, Geometric. This image appears on page 771 of the textbook.
![Figure 48 - A figure or diagram (488×283px) related to: Chapter,

• If the sum of an infin te series exists, it can be found using a formula. See Example 6, Example 7, and Example 8. • An annuity is an account into which the investor makes a series of regularly scheduled payments. The value of an annuity can be found using geometric series. See Example 9. 9.5 Counting Principles • If one event can occur in m ways and a second event with no common outcomes can occur in n ways, then the fi st or second event can occur in m + n ways. See Example 1. • If one event can occur in m ways and a second event can occur in n ways after the fi st event has occurred, then the two events can occur in m × n ways. See Example 2. • A permutation is an ordering of n objects. • If we have a set of n objects and we want to choose r objects from the set in order, we write P(n, r). • Permutation problems can be solved using the Multiplication Principle or the formula for P(n, r). See Example 3 and Example 4. • A selection of objects where the order does not matter is a combination. • Given n distinct objects, the number of ways to select r objects from the set is C (n, r) and can be found using a formula. See Example 5. • A set containing n distinct objects has 2n subsets. See Example 6. • For counting problems involving non-distinct objects, we need to divide to avoid counting duplicate permutations. See Example 7. 9.6 Binomial Theorem • ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ is called a binomial coeffici t and is equal to C (n, r). See Example 1. • The Binomial Theorem allows us to expand binomials without multiplying. See Example 2. • We can fi d a given term of a binomial expansi

Learning Objectives In this section, you will: • Apply the Binomial Theorem. 9.6 Binomial Theorem A polynomial with two terms is called a binomial. We have already learned to multiply binomials and to raise binomials to powers, but raising a binomial to a high power can be tedious and time-consuming. In this section, we will discuss a shortcut that will allow us to find (x + y)n without multiplying the binomial by itself n times. Identifying Binomial Coefficients In Counting Principles, we studied combinations. In the shortcut to finding (x + y)n, we will need to use combinations to find the coefficients that will appear in the expansion of the binomial. In this case, we use the notation ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ instead of C(n, r), but it can be calculated in the same way. So ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ = C(n, r) = ​ n! ________ r!(n − r)! ​ The combination ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ is called a binomial coefficient. An example of a binomial coefficient is ​ ​ 5 __ 2 ​ ​ = C(5, 2) = 10. binomial coefficients If n and r are integers greater than or equal to 0 with n ≥ r, then the binomial coefficient is ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ = C(n, r) = ​ n! ________ r!(n − r)! ​ Q & A… Is a binomial coefficient always a whole number? Yes. Just as the number of combinations must always be a whole number, a binomial coefficient will always be a whole number. Example 1 Finding Binomial Coefficients Find each binomial coefficient. a. ​ ​ 5 __ 3 ​ ​ b. ​ ​ 9 __ 2 ​ ​ c. ​ ​ 9 __ 7 ​ ​ Solution Use the formula to calculate each binomial coefficient. You can also use the nCr function on your calculator. ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ = C(n,

supplements.curriculum_md_raw:
# 二项式定理

## 基本信息
- **学科**: 数学
- **学段**: 高中
- **年级**: 高中11年级
- **章节**: 概率与统计
- **知识点**: 二项式定理
- **课标版本**: 普通高中课程标准（2017年版2020年修订）

---

## 一、课标原文

### 1.1 内容要求
> （数学 11年级）二项式定理的内容要求。学生应理解二项式定理的基本概念，掌握基本方法，能运用所学知识解决简单的实际问题。

### 1.2 学业要求
> 学生能准确描述二项式定理的相关概念，能进行基本的运算和推理，能解决与二项式定理相关的实际问题，形成初步的数学思维和素养。

### 1.3 教学提示
> 教学时应注重从学生熟悉的生活情境入手，引导学生通过具体操作、观察、归纳等方式理解二项式定理的概念。注重知识的发生发展过程，帮助学生建立知识之间的联系。

---

## 二、教学目标

### 2.1 知识与技能
- 学生能够理解二项式定理的概念、性质和运算方法
- 学生能够正确进行相关计算和推理
- 学生能够识别和描述相关的数学对象
- 学生能够理解二项式定理的概念、性质和运算方法

### 2.2 过程与方法
- 学生经历通过观察、归纳、类比等数学活动，经历概念的形成过程
- 学生能够运用数学思想方法解决问题
- 学生能够在交流中表达自己的思路
- 学生经历通过观察、归纳、类比等数学活动，经历概念的形成过程

### 2.3 情感态度与价值观
- 学生感受数学来源于生活又服务于生活
- 学生体验数学探究的乐趣，树立学好数学的信心
- 学生养成认真细致、独立思考的学习习惯
- 学生感受数学来源于生活又服务于生活

---

## 三、教学重难点

### 3.1 教学重点
- 二项式定理的概念、性质和应用
- 形成完整的知识体系结构
- 二项式定理的概念、性质和应用
- 形成完整的知识体系结构

### 3.2 教学难点
- 掌握二项式定理的基本运算和简单应用
- 建立知识之间的联系，实现知识的迁移应用
- 掌握二项式定理的基本运算和简单应用
- 建立知识之间的联系，实现知识的迁移应用

supplements.textbook_summary:
## 教材化讲解参考（由课标要点生成）

### 核心概念
二项式定理是数学学习中的重要知识点。教学时应围绕课标要点“高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「二项式定理」的基本概念与方法”展开，先明确概念边界，再通过例子、图示、实验、语篇或案例帮助学生建立可迁移的理解。

### 学习路径
1. 情境导入：从具体情境或图形表征切入，引导学生发现「二项式定理」中的数量关系，再抽象为符号、公式或模型。
2. 探究建构：采用“操作体验—表达归纳—变式应用”的路径，帮助学生把直观经验转化为可迁移的数学方法。
3. 应用迁移：围绕课标要点“高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「二项式定理」的基本概念与方法”，设置一题多解、数形结合或实际应用任务。

### 例题设计方向
可设计一道“识别核心概念”的基础题，一道“解释现象或文本材料”的理解题，一道“迁移到真实情境”的应用题，并要求学生说明依据。

A cruise around the world? The likelihood of winning the lottery is slim, but we all love to fantasize about what we could buy with the winnings. This decision is often based on many factors, such as tax implications, interest rates, and investment strategies. There are also personal reasons to consider when making the choice, and one can make many arguments for either decision. However, most lottery winners opt for the lump sum. We will also look at the branch of mathematics that would allow us to calculate the number of ways to choose lottery numbers and the probability of winning. Sequences, Probability and Counting Theory

See Example 6, Example 7, and Example 8. • An annuity is an account into which the investor makes a series of regularly scheduled payments. See Example 1. • The Binomial Theorem allows us to expand binomials without multiplying. See Example 2. • We can fi d a given term of a binomial expansi

Learning Objectives In this section, you will: • Apply the Binomial Theorem. 9.6 Binomial Theorem A polynomial with two terms is called a binomial. We have already learned to multiply binomials and to raise binomials to powers, but raising a binomial to a high power can be tedious and time-consuming. In this section, we will discuss a shortcut that will allow us to find (x + y)n without multiplying the binomial by itself n times. Identifying Binomial Coefficients In Counting Principles, we studied combinations. In the shortcut to finding (x + y)n, we will need to use combinations to find the coefficients that will appear in the expansion of the binomial. In this case, we use the notation ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ instead of C(n, r), but it can be calculated in the same way. So ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ = C(n, r) = ​ n! ________ r!(n − r)! ​ The combination ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ is called a binomial coefficient. An example of a binomial coefficient is ​ ​ 5 __ 2 ​ ​ = C(5, 2) = 10. binomial coefficients If n and r are integers greater than or equal to 0 with n ≥ r, then the binomial coefficient is ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ = C(n, r) = ​ n! ________ r!(n − r)! ​ Q & A… Is a binomial coefficient always a whole number? Yes. Just as the number of combinations must always be a whole number, a binomial coefficient will always be a whole number. Example 1 Finding Binomial Coefficients Find each binomial coefficient. a. ​ ​ 5 __ 3 ​ ​ b. ​ ​ 9 __ 2 ​ ​ c. ​ ​ 9 __ 7 ​ ​ Solution Use the formula to calculate each binomial coefficient. You can also use the nCr function on your calculator. ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​ = C(n,

How To… Given a binomial, write a specific term without fully expanding. 1. Determine the value of n according to the exponent. 2. Determine (r + 1). 3. Determine r. 4. Replace r in the formula for the (r + 1)th term of the binomial expansion. Example 3 Writing a Given Term of a Binomial Expansion Find the tenth term of (x + 2y)16 without fully expanding the binomial. Solution Because we are looking for the tenth term, r + 1 = 10, we will use r = 9 in our calculations. ​ ​ n _ r ​ ​xn − ryr ​ ​ 16 _ 9 ​ ​x16 − 9(2y)9 = 5,857,280x7y 9 Try It #3 Find the sixth term of (3x − y)9 without fully expanding the binomial. Access these online resources for additional instruction and practice with binomial expansion. • The Binomial Theorem (http://openstaxcollege.org/l/binomialtheorem) • Binomial Theorem Example (http://openstaxcollege.org/l/btexample)

deep_worked_example.stem: 根据教材片段，构造一道关于「二项式定理」的建模或计算题，并说明解题步骤。
deep_worked_example.solution_outline: 先识别变量和数量关系，再建立表达式、图形或方程，最后解释结果在情境中的含义。

errors.description: 只记「二项式定理」的公式或结论，不理解适用条件和变量含义。
解题时跳步，未把已知条件、关系式和结论之间的推理写完整。

exercises.stem: 根据课标要点，说明「二项式定理」中最关键的数量关系或图形关系是什么。
exercises.answer: 应围绕：高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「二项式定理」的基本概念与方法，说明概念、条件和表示方法。

exercises.stem: 设计一个生活情境，用「二项式定理」建立模型并解释结果。
exercises.answer: 需写出已知量、未知量、关系式或图形表示，并解释结论含义。

real_world: 在购物、行程、测量或数据分析中寻找与「二项式定理」相关的数量关系。
